top3.sql:
SELECT 
    '1995' AS year, 
    AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) AS unemployment_ratio 
FROM district 
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
    '1996' AS year, 
    AVG(CAST(A12 AS REAL)) AS unemployment_ratio 
FROM district;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) FILTER (WHERE A10 = 1995) > AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) FILTER (WHERE A10 = 1996) 
        THEN '1995' 
        ELSE '1996' 
    END AS higher_unemployment_year
FROM district;

SELECT 
    '1995' AS year, 
    AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) AS unemployment_ratio 
FROM district 
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
    '1996' AS year, 
    AVG(CAST(A12 AS REAL)) AS unemployment_ratio 
FROM district;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) FILTER (WHERE A10 = 1995) > AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) FILTER (WHERE A10 = 1996) 
        THEN '1995' 
        ELSE '1996' 
    END AS higher_unemployment_year
FROM district;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) > AVG(CAST(A12 AS REAL)) THEN '1995'
        ELSE '1996'
    END AS year_with_higher_unemployment_ratio,
    AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) AS unemployment_ratio_1995,
    AVG(CAST(A12 AS REAL)) AS unemployment_ratio_1996
FROM district;

SELECT 
    '1995' AS year, 
    AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) AS unemployment_ratio 
FROM district 
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
    '1996' AS year, 
    AVG(CAST(A12 AS REAL)) AS unemployment_ratio 
FROM district;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) FILTER (WHERE A10 = 1995) > AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) FILTER (WHERE A10 = 1996) 
        THEN '1995' 
        ELSE '1996' 
    END AS higher_unemployment_year
FROM district;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) > AVG(CAST(A12 AS REAL)) THEN '1995'
        ELSE '1996'
    END AS year_with_higher_unemployment_ratio,
    AVG(CAST(A11 AS REAL)) AS unemployment_ratio_1995,
    AVG(CAST(A12 AS REAL)) AS unemployment_ratio_1996
FROM district;
